seo.title: 12 Best Hotels in Krabi 2026 — Ao Nang, Railay & Beach Resorts
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Krabi for every budget. From Ao Nang hostels to Railay beach resorts and luxury pool villas at Tubkaek. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Krabi's accommodation spreads across distinct areas, each with a different vibe and price point. Budget travelers base in Krabi Town for night markets and cheap eats. Mid-range visitors pick Ao Nang for its convenience as the island-hopping hub. Luxury seekers head to Klong Muang or Tubkaek for secluded beachfront resorts, or Railay for its dramatic cliff-backed setting. Here are 12 hotels across all budgets — every one a real property with real prices.

hotels.name: Pak-Up Hostel
hotels.description: Krabi's most popular hostel occupies a converted shophouse in the heart of Krabi Town. Modern dorms with privacy curtains, lockers, and air conditioning. The rooftop bar and social common areas make it easy to meet other travelers. Walking distance to the night market and river.
highlights: Rooftop bar with views over Krabi Town
Modern dorm beds with AC and privacy curtains
Walking distance to Krabi Night Market and riverside

hotels.name: Sea Seeker Krabi Resort
hotels.description: A solid budget hotel in central Ao Nang with clean rooms, a swimming pool, and an unbeatable location near the beach and longtail boat pier. Rooms are basic but well-maintained with air conditioning and hot showers. The pool is a welcome bonus at this price point.
highlights: Swimming pool — rare at budget prices in Ao Nang
5-minute walk to Ao Nang Beach and boat pier
Clean rooms with reliable AC and hot water

hotels.name: Tonsai Bay Resort
hotels.description: Basic but characterful bungalows on Tonsai Beach — the backpacker and rock climbing hub of Railay peninsula. Wooden huts with fans or AC set among trees, steps from the beach. The vibe is laid-back and social with climbers swapping stories over cheap beer. Boat-access only adds to the island feel.
highlights: Beachfront location on Tonsai Beach
Heart of the climbing community
Island vibe with boat-access-only location

hotels.name: Panan Krabi Resort
hotels.description: A well-run mid-range resort in central Ao Nang with a large swimming pool, modern rooms with balconies, and a restaurant. Close enough to the beach and pier for easy island trips, but set back from the main road for quieter nights. Consistently good reviews for cleanliness and service.
highlights: Large swimming pool with sun terrace
Modern rooms with balcony and minibar
10-minute walk to Ao Nang Beach and boat pier

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Resort Krabi Ao Nang Beach
hotels.description: International chain quality right on Ao Nang's main strip. Two pools (including a kids' pool), fitness center, spa, and multiple dining options. The rooms are spacious and well-appointed with IHG's usual reliability. Ideal for families and travelers who want a predictable standard near the beach.
highlights: Two swimming pools including children's pool
IHG brand reliability and loyalty program
Beachfront location on Ao Nang main road

hotels.name: Railay Bay Resort & Spa
hotels.description: The best-value resort on Railay, straddling the peninsula between Railay West (swimming beach) and Railay East. Two pools, a beachfront restaurant, and direct access to both sides of the peninsula. Rooms range from garden-view bungalows to beachfront cottages. The boat-access-only setting gives it an island-resort atmosphere.
highlights: Access to both Railay West and East beaches
Two swimming pools and beachfront restaurant
Boat-access location creates exclusive island feel

hotels.name: Aonang Cliff Beach Resort
hotels.description: Set against the limestone cliffs at the eastern end of Ao Nang Beach with direct beach access and a dramatic cliff-backed pool. The location is prime — steps from the longtail boat pier for Railay and island tours. Rooms are comfortable with sea or cliff views. The natural cliff setting is unique among Ao Nang's hotels.
highlights: Dramatic cliff-backed swimming pool
Direct beach access at eastern Ao Nang
Steps from longtail boat pier for island tours

hotels.name: Rayavadee
hotels.description: One of Thailand's most iconic luxury resorts, set in 26 acres of tropical gardens on the Railay peninsula with private access to three beaches including Phra Nang Cave Beach. Two-story pavilions with outdoor living spaces are scattered among coconut palms. The setting between soaring limestone cliffs and turquoise sea is unmatched anywhere in the country.
highlights: Private access to three beaches including Phra Nang Cave Beach
Two-story pavilion suites in tropical gardens
Boat-access-only location between limestone cliffs — no cars, no roads

hotels.name: Phulay Bay, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve
hotels.description: The Ritz-Carlton's ultra-exclusive Reserve brand set on secluded Tubkaek Beach with dramatic views of limestone islands offshore. Enormous pool villas and pavilions with Thai-inspired design, a world-class spa, three restaurants, and the kind of white-glove service that justifies the price. One of only a handful of Ritz-Carlton Reserve properties worldwide.
highlights: Ritz-Carlton Reserve — one of few worldwide
Secluded Tubkaek Beach with limestone island views
Pool villas with outdoor living spaces and private butler service

hotels.name: Dusit Thani Krabi Beach Resort
hotels.description: A premium Thai chain resort on the quiet Klong Muang Beach, 20 minutes north of Ao Nang. Large free-form pool, private beach, Thai cooking classes, and spacious rooms with garden or sea views. Good value in the luxury bracket — you get 5-star facilities and beach at a fraction of Rayavadee or Ritz-Carlton prices.
highlights: Private beachfront on quiet Klong Muang Beach
Large free-form swimming pool and spa
Thai cooking classes and cultural activities on-site

hotels.name: Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort
hotels.description: French luxury chain resort with one of Southeast Asia's largest freeform swimming pools (at 230 meters long). Set on Klong Muang Beach with a private stretch of sand, 9-hole golf course, extensive spa, and multiple restaurants. The colonial-Thai architecture and manicured grounds give it a grand resort feel.
highlights: 230-meter freeform pool — one of SE Asia's largest
9-hole pitch-and-putt golf course
Private beach with kayaks and beach activities

hotels.name: Centara Grand Beach Resort & Villas Krabi
hotels.description: A secluded luxury resort on its own private Pai Plong Beach, accessible by boat or a 150-step cliffside stairway from Ao Nang. The dramatic cliff-surrounded setting feels like a private cove while being minutes from Ao Nang's restaurants and tours. Pool villas, beachfront rooms, spa, and multiple dining options.
highlights: Private Pai Plong Beach accessible only by boat or cliff stairway
Secluded cove setting surrounded by limestone cliffs
Close to Ao Nang but feels completely isolated

bookingTips: Book Railay accommodation well in advance for December-January — limited supply and high demand on the boat-access peninsula
Ao Nang has the widest selection and best value for mid-range travelers — easy access to Railay and islands by longtail
Klong Muang and Tubkaek offer luxury at lower prices than Railay — but you'll need transport to reach Ao Nang for tours
Low season (May-Oct) hotel prices drop 30-50% across the board — mainland hotels are still enjoyable even during monsoon
Krabi Town is the cheapest base — budget 60% less than Ao Nang for accommodation, though you'll spend 60 THB on songthaew to the beach
Check if your hotel offers airport pickup — it's usually 400-600 THB which is competitive with taxi prices
